things.name: Detian Waterfall
things.description: Asia's largest transnational waterfall on the China-Vietnam border

things.name: Guilin & Li River
things.description: Day trip to the iconic karst limestone scenery immortalised on the 20 yuan note

things.name: Guangxi Museum
things.description: Excellent museum of Zhuang and Guangxi ethnic minority culture with fine bronzes

things.name: Qingxiu Mountain Scenic Area
things.description: Forested mountain park with Buddhist temples and views over Nanning

things.name: Zhongshan Road Night Market
things.description: Nanning's famous snack street with Zhuang specialties like zongzi and luosifen

things.name: Beihai Silver Beach
things.description: One of China's finest white sand beaches on the Gulf of Tonkin

things.name: Guangxi Science and Technology Museum
things.description: Modern interactive science museum popular with families

things.name: Longevity Valley (Mashan)
things.description: A valley famous for longevity where centenarians are common in Zhuang villages

things.name: Xixiang Tang Wetland Park
things.description: Urban wetland park with mangroves, bird watching and lake views

things.name: Vietnam Border Crossing (Friendship Pass)
things.description: Historic Youyi Guan border pass with a monumental gateway to Vietnam
